name: NUBLE
description: HIGH-confidence vmax: 600,000 m3 collection pool. pasada — PLP efficiency=1.0 is the placeholder, so the promoted Turbine will use 1.0 MW/(m3/s) too (unscale is a no-op). Enable only after replacing production_factor with the real ficha técnica value.

name: LA_HIGUERA
description: HIGH-confidence vmax: Tricahue pondage 150,000 m3. serie — PLP eff=3.12 is the real MW/(m3/s) production factor. Local daily pondage at the turbine intake; does NOT double-count upstream Tinguiririca storage (two distinct physical reservoirs). When ser_ver=0 the reservoir's upper junction carries drain=True as the physical spill path (the gen waterway is the only outlet on that junction).

name: LA_CONFLUENCIA
description: HIGH-confidence vmax: 1,200,000 m3 daily pondage on Tinguiririca branch. serie — PLP eff=3.11 is the real production factor. Local pondage at turbine intake; separate from any upstream cascade reservoir.

name: ANGOSTURA
description: HIGH-confidence vmax: 641 ha x 1 m daily regulation ~6.4 hm3. serie — PLP eff=0.43 is the real production factor (Angostura is low-head, 328 MW / 763 m3/s). Local daily pondage; Colbun upstream reservoir is a distinct physical storage, no double-counting.

name: MACHICURA
description: HIGH-confidence vmax: Machicura pondage ~12 hm3 daily regulation aguas abajo de Colbun. serie — PLP eff=0.327 MW/(m3/s) (95 MW / 280 m3/s). Local daily pondage at the turbine intake; treated like any other serie in this whitelist — no special Maule-agreement coupling at the plp2gtopt layer.
